# What’s New at Iterable: Spring Product Release 2026

Webinar

# What’s New at Iterable: Spring Product Release 2026

April 29, 2026

60 minutes

On demand

## Description

Join us for the first session in our new ‘**What’s New**‘ series to get an inside look at the latest product innovations coming to Iterable this spring. In this session, Iterable leaders will introduce our biggest release yet and show how AI-powered customer engagement unlocks a new way for marketers to work, helping them move faster, personalize deeper, and drive stronger results – without adding operational complexity.

You’ll get a first look at the new capabilities we’re introducing at Activate, including: 

*   **AI Agents** that turn customer context into action
*   **Real-time** journey orchestration
*   **Faster execution** from idea to live, without engineering dependency
*   Built-in **governance** **and** **compliance controls**
*   **Unified audience activation** across every channel

This isn’t AI as an add-on. It’s a holistic execution layer that makes your marketing faster, sharper, and more predictable.
